skills.name: complete-ticket
skills.description: Implement a single change ticket from a ticket file — read the problem, write a failing test, make it pass, commit, and mark the ticket done.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: create-ticket
skills.description: Create a well-formed change ticket from a description, bug report, or feature request — extracting problem statement, acceptance criteria, and technical context into a ready-to-implement ticket file.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: estimate-effort
skills.description: Produce a justified effort estimate (S/M/L/XL) for a ticket, story, or feature request — assessing scope clarity, code touchpoints, test burden, unknowns, and risk factors, with a split recommendation if XL.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: write-changelog
skills.description: Generate a CHANGELOG entry for a release by reading git history, merged PR titles, and completed ticket files — grouped by change type and formatted to match the project's existing changelog convention.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: spec-to-backlog
skills.description: Convert a product specification, PRD, or feature description into a sequenced backlog of epics, user stories, technical stories, and spikes with acceptance criteria and dependency ordering.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: explain-codebase
skills.description: Answer "what does this do?" for a codebase, directory, or file. Produces a concise inline explanation without writing a documentation file.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: map-api-flow
skills.description: Map the full API call chain from frontend UI components through the API layer, across the network boundary, to backend controllers and services. Produces a Mermaid.js diagram and a bullet-point summary of critical data flow paths.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: onboard-codebase
skills.description: Produce a structured onboarding guide for a new engineer joining a project — covering architecture, local setup, key entry points, development workflow, and testing conventions — grounded in the actual codebase.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: research-codebase
skills.description: Research and produce comprehensive documentation for a codebase from a GitHub URL or local path.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: review-code
skills.description: Perform a structured code review of a file or function, covering correctness, security, readability, edge cases, and test coverage.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: summarise-pr
skills.description: Summarise a GitHub pull request — its purpose, key changes, and review considerations — given a URL or owner/repo#number reference.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: test-strategy
skills.description: Audit the current test pyramid, identify imbalances and coverage gaps, and produce a recommended test strategy with tooling, coverage targets, and a prioritised improvement plan.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: write-tests
skills.description: Generate tests for a specified file, function, or class. Matches the project's existing test framework, style, and conventions.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: design-api
skills.description: Design a REST (OpenAPI 3.x) or GraphQL API for a feature or service — covering resources, operations, request/response schemas, error states, pagination, auth, and versioning.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: document-api
skills.description: Reverse-engineer an existing API from source code — routes, controllers, models, and middleware — and produce a complete OpenAPI 3.x specification for what is actually implemented.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: design-system
skills.description: Convert a requirement or business goal into a reference architecture with C4 diagrams, component boundaries, trade-offs, NFRs, and risks.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: draft-rfc
skills.description: Scaffold a technical RFC (Request for Comments) or design spec for a feature or initiative, covering goals, non-goals, proposed solution, architecture, security, rollout, and alternatives.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: write-adr
skills.description: Generate an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) for a technical choice, capturing context, decision, alternatives considered, and consequences.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: debug-issue
skills.description: Diagnose a bug, error, or unexpected behaviour — given a symptom, stack trace, or error message — by reading relevant source, checking recent changes, and producing a ranked suspect list with specific fix recommendations.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: perf-investigate
skills.description: Diagnose performance bottlenecks in a system or codebase — latency, CPU, memory, or throughput — and produce a latency tree, suspect list, cache opportunities, and a concrete profiling plan.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: refactor-strategy
skills.description: Produce a large-scale refactoring or modernization roadmap with incremental migration phases, blast radius analysis, rollback plan, and risk register.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: dependency-risk
skills.description: Analyze package, vendor, or architecture dependency risk — covering supply chain exposure, license compatibility, vendor lock-in, coupling depth, and sustainability — and produce a risk table with prioritised remediation.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: security-audit
skills.description: Audit source code for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities — injection, broken auth, sensitive data exposure, misconfiguration, and more — producing a severity-ranked finding list with file locations and specific remediations.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: threat-model
skills.description: Apply STRIDE threat modelling to a system, component, or architecture description to identify threat vectors, trust boundaries, abuse cases, and mitigations.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: incident-review
skills.description: Produce a blameless postmortem and RCA for an incident — structured timeline, proximate and root cause analysis using 5 Whys, contributing factors, and actionable CAPAs with owners and dates.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: migrate-data
skills.description: Plan and scaffold a database migration — schema change or data transformation — with a rollback strategy, zero-downtime sequencing, pre/post deployment steps, and validation queries grounded in the project's actual migration tooling.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: platform-readiness
skills.description: Evaluate the production readiness of a service or platform across observability, security, CI/CD, scalability, and SLOs. Produces a RAG-scored checklist, findings with evidence, and a prioritised remediation list.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: generate-runbook
skills.description: Generate or update an operational runbook for a service — covering deployment, rollback, health checks, on-call escalation, common failure modes with diagnosis steps, alert procedures, and routine maintenance.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: context-engineering
skills.description: Generate or audit an agent context file (CLAUDE.md or equivalent) for a codebase — extracting project conventions, commands, architecture, tool permissions, and anti-patterns from the actual code.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: agent-loop-design
skills.description: Design an autonomous, policy-driven agent loop — covering loop pattern, phases, guardrails, HITL checkpoints, tool contracts, and observability — for a given workflow or governance objective.
skills.author: fabianmagrini

skills.name: skill-generator
skills.description: Generate a new SKILL.md from a description of a repeated workflow. Elicits trigger conditions, discovery steps, output format, and gotchas before writing — producing a schema-compliant first draft ready for review.
skills.author: fabianmagrini
